title: Medicaid Information/Counseling - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Medicaid Information/Counseling 19 Matching Service Providers OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON ONE ELIGIBILITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online application portal for public assistance programs, including the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP/food stamps), Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Employment Related Daycare (ERDC), and Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF). Applicants submit one application to be considered for all programs for which they are eligible. 500 Summer Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Eligibility requirements vary by program and depend on household size and household income. Refer to federal poverty level (FPL) chart for details. Hours: ONE Customer Service Center: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm Email (800) 699-9075 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps people find experts who provide in-person assistance with health insurance enrollment. Health Insurance Agents help with private insurance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace (OHIM), while Community Partners, also called assisters, help with enrollment in the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 500 Summer Street NE E-49 Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by service (503) 945-5772 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ASIAN HEALTH AND SERVICE CENTER INFORMATION AND RESOURCE CONNECTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific services, including health and wellness resources, interpretation and translation, and connections to community resources. Also offers help with health insurance screening and enrollment. 9035 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97266 Eligibility: Asian community members Hours: Varies by service (503) 872-8822 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CHANCE 2ND CHANCE SHELTER PEER SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides services such as limited assistance obtaining Oregon ID, mailing addresses, GED tutoring, and essential supplies as available (such as toothpaste, shampoo, soap, and deodorant). Also provides job search assistance such as preparing a resume, completing job applications, and interview techniques. Other services include: counseling including anger management, detox and rehab referrals, Oregon Health Plan enrollment assistance, and computer and internet access. 1100 Jackson Street SE Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (541) 967-8545 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. Volunteers help people understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. They can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm (503) 655-8269 Get Directions Visit Website More Details DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access benefits and services earned through military service and provided by the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) and other government agencies such as healthcare, disability compensation, education, employment, and financial assistance. Provides additional support services like job finding assistance, Medicare information and counseling, transportation to medical appointments, emergency financial grants, support groups, volunteer opportunities, advocacy, and more. 100 SW Main Street Room 212a Portland, OR 97204 Eligibility: Veterans or dependents of veterans, with a focus on those with disabilities Hours: -National Call Center: 6am-1pm -Local Office Phone: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-3:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon -Local Office Walk in: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 8am-2:30pm, Wednesday 8am-noon Email (503) 412-4750 Get Directions Visit Website More Details EL CENTRO NW OHP ASSISTANCE AND HEALTH NAVIGATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides support with Oregon Health Plan (OHP) applications, renewals, updates, questions, billing issues, and document uploads. Ensures signers understand documents and have valid ID for verification. Helps find culturally appropriate health services. 300 S Roosevelt Drive Suite #5 Seaside, OR 97138 Eligibility: Latinx/Hispanic community members or Spanish language speakers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5:30pm Email (971) 414-7270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides trained volunteers who educate, assist, and serve as advocates for people with Medicare. SHIBA volunteers help people with Medicare understand their rights and options for health insurance so that they can make informed decisions. SHIBA volunteers can also provide information on the Qualified Medicare Beneficiary (QMB) program, a Medicaid program that helps people with Medicare pay for their medical care. 610 NW 11th Street Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Individuals with Medicare and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 667-3509 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES EUGENE OFFICE MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information and assistance with applying for Medicaid. 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-4038 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Trained community partners help individuals fill out an application for Oregon Health Plan (OHP). 1108 SW 4th Street Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Age 19-64 and low income households Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm (541) 889-7279 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK ENTERPRISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Medicaid programs, Qualified Health Plans, and financial assistance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace. Also offers help with reporting changes, submitting documents, and resolving complex issues. Provides referrals and navigation support to access health and social services as needed. 401 NE 1st Street Suite 111 Enterprise, OR 97828 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-1pm (541) 398-2539 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK LA GRANDE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides application assistance for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP), Medicaid programs, Qualified Health Plans, and financial assistance through the Oregon Health Insurance Marketplace. Also offers help with reporting changes, submitting documents, and resolving complex issues. Provides referrals and navigation support to access health and social services as needed. 2008 Third Street Suite A La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: By appointment only Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-1pm (541) 624-5101 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES TOTAL HEALTH COMMUNITY CLINIC OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assist community members in applying for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) Medicaid. 180 Atwater Street N Monmouth, OR 97361 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours, by appointment only. Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES WEST SALEM CLINIC OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assist community members in applying for the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) Medicaid. 1233 Edgewater Street NW Salem, OR 97304 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours, by appointment only. Email (503) 378-7526 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES APD JOSEPHINE COUNTY CENTRAL POINT ROGUE VALLEY COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of services to older adults and adults with disabilities, including assessment, case management, administration of SNAP (food stamps), Oregon Supplemental Income Program (OSIP) and other Medicaid programs, Medicare Savings Programs, and information and referral to coordinated programs and services. 155 N 1st Street Central Point, OR 97502 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 664-6674 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES APD JOSEPHINE COUNTY GRANTS PASS AGING AND PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a range of services to older adults and adults with disabilities, including assessment, case management, administration of SNAP (food stamps), Oregon Supplemental Income Program (OSIP) and other Medicaid programs, Medicare Savings Programs, and information and referral to coordinated programs and services. Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with disabilities age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 474-3110 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SALUD CONNECT OHP ASSISTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers OHP services and education, including new enrollments, renewals, scheduling dental, primary care, and mental health appointments, answering billing questions, and updating client information. Provides assistance with applying for Health-Related Social Needs (HRSN) benefits such as housing, climate support, and nutrition. Also connects clients with additional community resources. Website Yamhill, OR 97148 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the Latinx community Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5:30pm Email (971) 301-3207 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SLAVIC COMMUNITY CENTER OF NW OHP AND TRIMET HONORED CITIZEN ENROLLMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists with enrollment in Oregon Health Plan (OHP) and TriMet Honored Citizen pass. Eligibility: Individuals who identify as part of the Slavic Community Hours: Wednesday 10am-2pm by appointment only Email (503) 272-1470 Get Directions Visit Website More Details UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES CENTERS FOR MEDICARE & MEDICAID SERVICES MEDICAID.GOV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Federal website providing information about Medicaid, the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), and the Basic Health Program (BHP). 7500 Security Boulevard Baltimore, MD 21244 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (877) 486-2048 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES OREGON ONE ELIGIBILITY OREGON STATE DIVISION OF MEDICAL ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS OHP IN-PERSON APPLICATION ASSISTANCE ASIAN HEALTH AND SERVICE CENTER INFORMATION AND RESOURCE CONNECTION CHANCE PEER SUPPORT SERVICES CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS VA REGIONAL OFFICE OREGON DISABLED AMERICAN VETERANS EL CENTRO NW OHP ASSISTANCE AND HEALTH NAVIGATION GOOD SHEPHERD HEALTH CARE SYSTEM SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE LANE COUNCIL OF GOVERNMENTS SENIOR & DISABILITY SERVICES MEDICAID MALHEUR COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT OREGON HEALTH PLAN APPLICATION ASSISTANCE NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK ENTERPRISE NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK NORTHEAST OREGON NETWORK LA GRANDE NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT NORTHWEST HUMAN SERVICES OREGON HEALTH PLAN ENROLLEMENT OREGON DEPARTMENT OF HUMAN SERVICES APD JOSEPHINE COUNTY OLDER ADULTS AND ADULTS WITH DISABILITIES SERVICES SALUD CONNECT OHP ASSISTER
